title: FileDiff API Response
description: Response schema for GET /api/runs/{id}/diff/{path...} — single file diff content.

path.description: Relative file path within the repository

content.description: Unified diff text content (empty string for binary files or unavailable diffs)

truncated.description: Whether the diff was truncated due to size limit

size.description: Total size of diff content in bytes (before truncation)

old_path.description: Original file path for renamed files
